home.commercialText: From concept to completion, Folka helps you build the perfect coffee bar with the right equipment, training, and expert advice. We're not just a supplier. We're your partner.

home.baristaPicksDescription: A curated shortlist of the equipment trusted at specialty bars and home setups, chosen for craft, consistency, and the long haul.

home.storiesFeatureDescription: Conversations about craft and effort. The road they took to get where they are.

collections.title: Collections
collections.shopByCategoryDescription: Browse our curated equipment categories: from espresso machines and grinders to brewing gear and barista accessories.

descriptions.espressoMachines: Espresso machines for home and café. Rocket, La Marzocco, Profitec, Lelit. Installed and supported from Monterrey.
descriptions.commercialEspresso: Commercial machines built for cafés pulling hundreds of shots a day. Slayer, La Marzocco, Faema, Cimbali. Serviced by Folka.
descriptions.homeGrinders: Precision grinders for your home setup. Niche, Fellow, Baratza, DF64. The link that defines how good the cup really gets.
descriptions.commercialGrinders: Grinders for the professional bar. Mazzer, Mahlkönig, Eureka, Ceado. Consistency, shift after shift.
descriptions.brewing: Pour over, French press, AeroPress, siphon. Everything you need to get the best from a bean beyond espresso.
descriptions.accessories: Barista tools: tampers, pitchers, distributors, cloths. What turns a decent cup into one you'll remember.
descriptions.drinkware: Cups, glassware and saucers to serve with intention. Acme, NotNeutral, Kinto, Origami. Every sip matters.
descriptions.scales: Acaia, Felicita and Timemore scales. Grams, time, flow. The quiet tool every serious barista relies on.
descriptions.cleaning: Detergents, brushes and tablets to keep your gear dialed. Urnex, Cafiza, Puly. Care for the machine, care for the coffee.
descriptions.coffee: Specialty coffee roasted in Monterrey. Chiapas and Guerrero origins, traceable and fresh. Roasted to order.
descriptions.tea: Teas, matcha and beverages to round out your menu. Options for baristas thinking beyond coffee.
descriptions.syrups: Syrups, chai and powders for cafés. Ingredients for signature drinks with a clean, deliberate profile.
descriptions.merch: Totes, travel mugs, aprons and stickers. A piece of Folka to take with you to the next shift.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: We're here to help, whether you're building your first espresso setup, looking for the right grinder for your bar, or evaluating equipment for your café. Reach out on the channel you prefer.
contact.whatsappDescription: The fastest way to get answers about products, availability, and shipping. Same-day replies.

contact.serviceDescription: Machine needs maintenance or has a breakdown? Coffee Worx Tech, our service arm, has you covered.

warranty.title: Your equipment, protected from day one
warranty.intro: As official importers, every machine we sell comes with factory warranty. And when you need help, Coffee Worx Tech (our in-house technical service team) has your back.
warranty.warrantyBody: Every Folka machine is imported through official channels, meaning the manufacturer backs each piece of equipment directly. We handle the warranty process so you don't have to deal with international manufacturers.
warranty.cwtBody: Our service arm supports both commercial cafés and home baristas. Nationwide coverage in Mexico with remote support across the country.
warranty.service1Description: Scheduled servicing for cafés and home setups. The best way to make your equipment last.
warranty.service2Description: When your machine fails mid-service, we respond the same day.
warranty.service3Description: Professional setup of machines, grinders, and water systems.
warranty.service4Description: Rebuilds, upgrades, and tuning to take your equipment to the next level.
warranty.service5Description: Specialized water systems. 98% of your espresso is water.
warranty.service6Description: Phone or video assistance for fast diagnostics without a site visit.
warranty.ctaDescription: Message us on WhatsApp with your equipment model and a photo of the issue. We reply the same day.

about.title: Specialty coffee between Monterrey and San Antonio
about.intro: Folka was born to bridge the gap between producers, passionate cafés, and curious drinkers. We're official importers of premium coffee equipment, roasters of Mexican specialty coffee, and the operational arm for independent cafés looking to grow with the right tools.
about.heroImageAlt: Rocket espresso machine on a home coffee bar
about.storyTitle: From farm to cup, and everything in between.
about.storyBody1: Folka Coffee Solutions (also known as CAFE FOLKA) is a specialty coffee company born between Monterrey, Mexico and San Antonio, Texas. We exist to help independent cafés thrive with equipment, supplies, consulting, training and real support.
about.storyBody2: Good coffee isn't just a cup. It's a complete system: machine, grinder, calibration, water and technique working together. Our mission is to make that system accessible to anyone who wants to build it, whether you're a professional barista or someone setting up your first home bar.
about.storyBody3: We're members of the SCA (Specialty Coffee Association) and we work with smallholder farms and cooperatives in Chiapas and Guerrero, betting on long relationships, fair prices, and transparency at every step.
about.pillar1Title: Behind every great cup there's a complete system.
about.pillar1Body: We don't just sell machines. We sell the ecosystem: grinder calibration, the right water, proper maintenance, solid technique. Every piece matters, and we help you make them all fit together.
about.pillar2Body: Specialty baristas and cafés don't improvise their equipment. They carefully choose each tool that supports their craft. We bring those tools (Slayer, La Marzocco, Mazzer, Acaia, Fellow) and back them with in-house technical service.
about.offeringsTitle: A complete partner for your coffee project.
about.offering1Description: Premium espresso machines, grinders, and brewing equipment for home and commercial use. Slayer, La Marzocco, Rocket, Mazzer, BUNN, Mahlkönig and more.
about.offering2Description: Mexican specialty coffee roasted by us, with beans from Chiapas and Guerrero. Direct relationships with producers and transparency on every lot.
about.offering3Description: Scales, pitchers, tampers, filters, kettles and barista gear. Acaia, Fellow, ACME, Hario, Kinto, Kalita, Chemex.
about.offering4Description: Café consulting from concept to operation: bar design, equipment selection, and hands-on support.
about.offering5Description: Training programs for baristas and café operators. Professional education based on real practice.
about.offering6Description: Coffee Worx Tech, our service arm, covers maintenance, installation, rebuilds, and remote support across Mexico.
about.origin1Description: High-altitude coffee from southern Mexico. Sweet, fruity profiles from smallholder producers in mountainous regions.
about.origin2Description: Pacific coast coffee. Bold beans with warm notes from microlots we work with directly.
about.ctaDescription: Whether it's your first home grinder or a commercial bar from scratch, our team walks you through every decision.

faq.title: Everything you need to know
faq.intro: Straight answers on orders, shipping, warranty, returns, and commercial projects. Can't find what you're looking for? Message us on WhatsApp. We reply the same day.
faq.ctaDescription: Reach out on WhatsApp or from the contact page. A Folka specialist will reply the same day.
